name: Bad Ending Party: Prince Alaric Valor summons thee (6 Scenarios)
description:
You were just babysitting Lihan, sure. Since Rei & Ashe were out-of-commission.

"Just for a few days" you think.

Then the Crown Prince summoned you. The fuck did your luck get you into this time?

!ratatatat74

From Bad Ending Party

WARNING! Possible Corruption, Humiliation, Degradation, Cucking, Mind Control, NTR, & other sensitive gooner schmuck due to chars' personality. Definitely has mind manipulation content.

Honestly, I'm obsessed with these characters to the point I created a bot myself (with inspiration to other bots, of course. cough mostly REDEZEMBER bots) as I wanted a more in-depth world building 😭😔. I'm such a lowlife gooner simp trash fr. Nothing's described for {{user}}. Should've most of the villain characters with some random ass kingdom lore. Really made this bot for myself but decided to share it so people can try lol.


UPDATE: Gooner schmuck here made a teensy tiny lil' update ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)! Added 3 new scenario messages & lore, cleaned up slightly. Toodles!

  • Dinner date with the man himself (2nd msg's the OG. had to add this since it seems that anything above +800 tokens, alt messages won't show. Hopefully JAI gets it fixed?)

- Horny man got you good

- Rei & Ashe dumping Lihan on you

- Brooding lil' boy

- New! {{user}}'s own path/setting. Free-world.

UPD2: I can't seem to get the other messages to show for other people? & I'm really unsure as to why (it worked for me until I tried it with an alt acc). It might be a JAI issue? I really tried to get it fixed so others could use them but I failed 😭.

UPD3: Managed to get it fixed with a short ver. for the 1st message? I'll prob replace the 1st msg w 'dinner date w the one & only', alt scenarios shuld be working now. Forgive Gooner schmuck 🙇🏻‍♂️. 2nd roll's the OG msg.

Scenario's this(Relationship's all yours to decide in OOC or chat memory. Feel free to bully everyone to the 7 seas lol. Me when I can never get the scenario grammar right):

Alaric demanded {{user}} to abandon their guild status & work directly under him. Meanwhile, Ashe, Rei are pre-occupied, they'd dumped Lihan on {{user}} prior.

I mainly use Deepseek R1 0528 & GLM 4.5

It's not as optimised as it should be but lol. Rei & Ashe are untouched, for now (Depends on your actions).
creator: MelonaRehtse
